title: Remove ICP, Radar, Order Book, and Monitor tabs

requirements.text: Remove the ICP Analysis tab (ICPAnalysis component) from the tab navigation and from the app entirely, including its lazy-loaded import, route entry, and any navigation references.

quotes: Icp, radar, order book e monitor. Podem ser removidas.

acceptanceCriteria: No ICP tab appears in the tab bar
ICPAnalysis component is not imported or rendered anywhere
App builds without references to the removed tab

requirements.text: Remove the Radar tab (RadarDashboard component and DynamicAlerts) from the tab navigation and from the app entirely, including its lazy-loaded import, route entry, and any navigation references.

quotes: Icp, radar, order book e monitor. Podem ser removidas.

acceptanceCriteria: No Radar tab appears in the tab bar
RadarDashboard component is not imported or rendered anywhere
DynamicAlerts component tied solely to radar is removed or disabled
App builds without references to the removed tab

requirements.text: Remove the Order Book tab (OrderBook component) from the tab navigation and from the app entirely, including its lazy-loaded import, route entry, and any navigation references.

quotes: Icp, radar, order book e monitor. Podem ser removidas.

acceptanceCriteria: No Order Book tab appears in the tab bar
OrderBook component is not imported or rendered anywhere
App builds without references to the removed tab

requirements.text: Remove the Trade Monitor tab (TradeMonitoring component, MonitoredTradeCard, TradeMonitoringPanel, StopLossRecommendation, TakeProfitZones) from the tab navigation and from the app entirely, including its lazy-loaded import, route entry, and any navigation references.

quotes: Icp, radar, order book e monitor. Podem ser removidas.

acceptanceCriteria: No Monitor tab appears in the tab bar
TradeMonitoring and all child components exclusive to this tab are not imported or rendered anywhere
App builds without references to the removed tab

requirements.text: Remove all hooks, query files, and libraries that are exclusively used by the removed tabs (ICP, Radar, Order Book, Monitor) and are not referenced by any remaining tab. This includes but may not be limited to: orderBookDepth.ts (hook and lib), useMonitoredTrade.ts, useMonitoredTrades.ts, useRadarSensitivity.ts, radarFilters.ts, radarSensitivity.ts, stopLossCalculation.ts, takeProfitCalculation.ts, tradeStorage.ts, and related query files.

quotes: Icp, radar, order book e monitor. Podem ser removidas.

acceptanceCriteria: No dead imports remain in the bundle for the removed tabs
All removed files' imports are cleaned up from any remaining components
Frontend builds and runs without errors

requirements.text: Update the PWA manifest (frontend/public/manifest.json) to remove any shortcuts pointing to the removed tabs (ICP, Radar, Order Book, Monitor).

quotes: Icp, radar, order book e monitor. Podem ser removidas.

acceptanceCriteria: manifest.json shortcuts no longer reference removed tabs
Remaining shortcuts are valid and point to existing tabs

constraints: Do not remove or modify any tabs other than ICP, Radar, Order Book, and Monitor
Do not alter backend/main.mo unless a removed tab had exclusive backend endpoints — in that case, retain shared endpoints
Do not edit files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Redesigning the UI layout of remaining tabs
Modifying backend data models or storage logic
